strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems, including AI-agent infrastructure and GIS platforms
Strong emphasis on clean architecture, testing, and developer tooling with TDD and CI/CD practices
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer) suggest seniority beyond junior/mid-level scope
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services listed as preferred in job description
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web architectures with a strong track record in building scalable systems, aligning well with the technical demands of the role; however, their senior job titles and lack of German proficiency raise questions about fit for an entry-level position requiring high on-site presence.
